title: Embed Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar in monday

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Managing projects with multiple calendars can be tricky, especially when switching between apps. With Multi Embed app, you can embed Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar directly into your monday, keeping everything in one place.

Group 12611581971920×2199 202 KB

Centralized Calendar Management
If your team uses different calendars, embedding them in monday helps everyone stay aligned. Instead of hopping between apps, you can view and manage all your schedules right within your workspace.

Benefits

  1. Simplified Access: No more jumping between tabs. Your calendar is right there, easy to access whenever you need it.
  2. Better Collaboration: Everyone on your team can see the same calendar, improving coordination.
  3. Custom Layout: You can adjust the calendar’s size and position to fit your view, making it work for you.
